title: Saudian Fish Tagine
description: A classic North African dish with a blend of aromatic spices and tender fish.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets (such as tilapia or cod)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish fillets, skin side up (if they have skin). Cook for 3-4 minutes, until the skin is golden brown.
Flip the fish over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until cooked through.
Stir in the ginger paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
